# Regex fixtures for skill: incident-analysis
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines mix one SHIP-routing contrast (ship/merge/release prose) with
# adversarial near-misses (error, connection, deploy/staging tokens adjacent to
# this skill's alternations) that the regex must reject.

MATCH: investigate the production outage from last night
MATCH: why did the pod crashloop after the deploy
MATCH: p99 latency spike on the checkout service
MATCH: error budget burn rate looks bad this week
MATCH: write the postmortem for yesterdays incident

NO_MATCH: lets ship and merge this release
NO_MATCH: review the error handling in this PR
NO_MATCH: configure the connection string for the new database
NO_MATCH: deploy the new version to staging
NO_MATCH: run the tests locally and show me pass/fail before I push
